result.evidence_summary: A 2010 blog post on sunvalleylife.com describes the 'Sun Valley Nordic Festival' as the second annual event from January 29 to February 6, featuring races like the Swix Boulder Mountain Tour with 800+ expected participants and $11,000 in prizes. A Valley Chamber page mentions locals founded the festival by 2010 as an annual celebration of cross-country skiing. No official website, race results, news articles, or listings in major series found.
